marriage ofhis daughter after four months and 18 days. It is
a quintile aspect. The fourth as a semi square involved to lord
of the sixth who has changed signs with Saturn. Saturn as
pects the second lord and the twelfth house. There was an
operation for a cataract. The first was in Rahu-Guru-Budha,
the second in Guru-Rahu-Ravi, the third in Shani-Chandra
Budha, and last in Budha-Budha-Ketu.
We can correct the position ofM.C. by making the times of
the last two equal. This requires deducting two seconds from
the given time of birth. But we have to wait till we notice the
other aspects. Consider the Moon.

The Moon as a malefic gave a new job by the middle of
July, 49 and he gave it up on the first of Aug., 49. The
conjunction of the Me was not favourable. It was in Guru-

Symbolic Directions 121
Guru-Rahu.
